## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the app do?

## Affected Area

Examples: local records, statistics, WebDAV backup, Cloudflare sync, image attachments, import/export, PWA, Android, iOS, documentation.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any simpler or safer alternatives.

## Additional Context

Do not include real ledger data, passwords, tokens, WebDAV credentials, invite codes, or private attachment images.
